summary: Iteration 2 testing of VaxChain Monitor NodeMCU bidirectional connectivity (HTTP/MQTT) and mobile design fixes. Backend: 10/10 pytest passed (6 new for ingest/commands/status/mirror + 4 regression). Frontend: mobile drawer correctly overlays with bg-black/60 backdrop-blur (no content shift, Start button stays in viewport), GEOFENCE_EXIT does NOT fire on session start with geofence OFF, Settings Mode dropdown has all 4 expected options, DeviceLinkCard with cmd-* buttons present, simulator excursion command click is no-op without JS errors, and HTTP-mode end-to-end (curl POST -> /api/ingest -> UI gauge update within ~5s) verified — gauge updated to 16.23°C, sensors/GPS/battery reflected the curl payload, backend telemetry GET returned 3 ascending points.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/devices/{id}/telemetry sorts desc with limit then reverses in-memory — for limit=500 this is fine, but if you ever raise limit consider using sort asc + skip/cursor for pagination.

Default consume=true on GET /api/devices/{id}/commands silently drains commands on any GET; safe for the NodeMCU poll loop but a UI 'preview' caller could accidentally consume. Consider naming the consuming endpoint differently (e.g., /commands/poll vs /commands).
device_status only marks online when last_seen <60s; this is hard-coded. Consider env-driven threshold to match NodeMCU heartbeat cadence.

Iter1 carry-over still valid: PATCH /api/sessions accepts raw Dict (no Pydantic model); deprecated on_event startup; CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True; missing Mongo indexes; telemetry hard-cap 5000 with no pagination.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST-dev-* device docs in db.devices, db.device_telemetry, db.device_commands and one test-dev-fe-<ts> device used for HTTP end-to-end. Plus a TEST_mirror session with mirrored telemetry. Not cleaned up; safe (namespaced).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests for new endpoints live at /app/backend/tests/test_device_ingest.py and cover: POST /api/ingest/{device_id} (ok+true, default-timestamp, last_seen update reflected in /devices/{id}/status, mirror to session telemetry when session_id provided), GET /api/devices/{id}/telemetry (ascending by ts, no _id/device_id leak), POST+GET /api/devices/{id}/commands with consume=true|false (idempotency), GET /api/devices/{id}/status (online flag, info, pending_commands count, unknown device returns online=false). Frontend testids confirmed: menu-toggle-btn, mobile-drawer, mobile-drawer-close, link-status-chip, m-nav-* (drawer) and nav-* (sidebar) for monitor/alerts/cooling/transport/sessions/settings, settings-source (Radix Select with options Simulator/MQTT (NodeMCU live)/HTTP (NodeMCU REST)/Firebase (configure)), settings-device-id, settings-geo-enabled, device-link-card, cmd-setpoint-btn, cmd-excursion-btn, cmd-reset-btn, start-session-btn (text toggles Start<->Stop). Mobile drawer at 390px is a true overlay: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm covers full 390x844, content x/width shift = 0.00, top-bar Start button bounding rect (293,12,81x32) stays in viewport with drawer open. GEOFENCE_EXIT no longer fires when settings.geofence.enabled is false (default). HTTP adapter polling cadence ~4s, allow ~7s wait after curl POST for gauge to refresh. To re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v from /app.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration. Both iter1 design issues fixed: (1) mobile drawer is now a true overlay with backdrop instead of pushing content; (2) GEOFENCE_EXIT alert is gated on settings.geofence.enabled.
